controls.label: Does your business have a Customer Due Diligence — Companies process?
controls.remediation: Your organisation does not have a Customer Due Diligence — Companies process in place. You must establish a documented Customer Due Diligence — Companies process to meet your AML/CTF obligations. Review the controls below and implement the required procedures before completing this assessment.

controls.label: Does your Customer Identification Procedure include risk-based systems and controls to be reasonably satisfied that company customers exist?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based systems and controls for establishing company existence
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure does not include adequate risk-based systems and controls to establish that company customers exist. Implement systems and controls designed to enable your entity to be reasonably satisfied of company existence before commencing designated services, as required under rule 4.3.2(1).

controls.label: Does your procedure collect the minimum KYC information for domestic companies?

checklist-items.label: Full name of the company as registered by ASIC
Full address of the company's registered office
Full address of the company's principal place of business (if any)
ACN issued to the company
Whether the company is registered by ASIC as a proprietary or public company
If proprietary company: name of each director

controls.remediation: Your Collection of KYC Information procedure does not collect the minimum required information for domestic company customers. Update your procedure to collect full company name (as registered by ASIC), registered office address, principal place of business address (if any), ACN, company type (proprietary or public), and director names for proprietary companies, as required under rules 4.3.3(1)(a) through 4.3.3(1)(f).

controls.label: Does your procedure collect the minimum KYC information for registered foreign companies?

checklist-items.label: Full name of the company as registered by ASIC
Full address of the company's registered office in Australia

items.label: Full address of the company's principal place of business in Australia (if any)
Full name and address of the company's local agent in Australia (if any)

checklist-items.label: ARBN issued to the company
Country in which the company was formed, incorporated or registered
Whether the company is registered by the relevant foreign registration body and if so whether it is registered as a private or public company or some other type of company
If registered as a private company: name of each director

controls.remediation: Your Collection of KYC Information procedure does not collect the minimum required information for registered foreign company customers. Update your procedure to collect full company name (as registered by ASIC), registered office address in Australia, principal place of business or local agent details, ARBN, country of formation, foreign registration status and company type, and director names for private companies, as required under rules 4.3.3(2)(a) through 4.3.3(2)(g).

controls.label: Does your procedure collect the minimum KYC information for unregistered foreign companies?

checklist-items.label: Full name of the company
Country in which the company was formed, incorporated or registered
Whether the company is registered by the relevant foreign registration body
If registered: identification number issued by the foreign registration body
If registered: full address in country of formation as registered by the foreign registration body
If registered: whether registered as private, public, or other company type
If registered as private company: name of each director
If not registered: full address of principal place of business in country of formation or incorporation

controls.remediation: Your Collection of KYC Information procedure does not collect the minimum required information for unregistered foreign company customers. Update your procedure to collect full company name, country of formation, foreign registration status (and if registered: identification number, address, company type, and director names for private companies; or if not registered: principal place of business address), as required under rules 4.3.3(3)(a) through 4.3.3(3)(e).

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether to collect additional KYC information beyond the minimum for company customers?
controls.detail-label: Describe how you assess whether to collect additional company KYC information
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure does not include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether additional KYC information about company existence should be collected beyond the minimum requirements. Implement a risk-based process to assess whether extra company KYC information is required based on the customer's risk profile, as required under rule 4.3.4.

controls.label: Does your procedure verify the minimum required information for domestic companies?

checklist-items.label: Full name of the company as registered by ASIC
Whether the company is registered by ASIC as a proprietary or public company
ACN issued to the company

controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not verify the minimum required information for domestic company customers. Update your procedure to verify the full company name as registered by ASIC, company type (proprietary or public), and ACN, as required under rules 4.3.5(1)(a), 4.3.5(1)(b), and 4.3.5(1)(c).

controls.label: Does your procedure verify the minimum required information for registered foreign companies?

checklist-items.label: Full name of the company as registered by ASIC
Whether the company is registered by the relevant foreign registration body and if so whether it is registered as a private or public company
ARBN issued to the company

controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not verify the minimum required information for registered foreign company customers. Update your procedure to verify the full company name as registered by ASIC, foreign registration status and company type (private or public), and ARBN, as required under rules 4.3.5(2)(a), 4.3.5(2)(b), and 4.3.5(2)(c).

controls.label: Does your procedure verify the minimum required information for unregistered foreign companies?

checklist-items.label: Full name of the company
Whether the company is registered by the relevant foreign registration body
If registered: identification number issued by the foreign registration body
If registered: whether the company is registered as a private or public company

controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not verify the minimum required information for unregistered foreign company customers. Update your procedure to verify the full company name and, if registered by a foreign registration body, the identification number and company type (private or public), as required under rules 4.3.5(3)(a), 4.3.5(3)(b), 4.3.5(3)(i), and 4.3.5(3)(i)(ii).

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether to verify additional KYC information beyond the minimum for company customers?
controls.detail-label: Describe how you assess whether to verify additional company KYC information
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure does not include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether additional KYC information about companies should be verified beyond the minimum requirements. Implement a risk-based process to assess whether collected company KYC information requires verification based on the customer's risk profile, as required under rule 4.3.6.

controls.label: When determining whether to collect and/or verify additional company KYC information, does your procedure require consideration of ML/TF risk relevant to the designated service?
controls.detail-label: Describe how ML/TF risk is factored into decisions about additional collection and verification
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure does not require consideration of ML/TF risk when determining whether to collect or verify additional company KYC information. Update your procedure to mandate assessment of ML/TF risk relevant to the designated service when making decisions about additional collection or verification, as required under rule 4.3.7.

controls.label: Does your AML/CTF program include a simplified company verification procedure for domestic listed public companies, their majority owned subsidiaries, or companies licensed and subject to regulatory oversight by a Commonwealth, State or Territory statutory regulator?
controls.detail-label: Describe your simplified verification procedure for these company types
controls.remediation: Your AML/CTF program does not include the optional simplified company verification procedure for lower-risk domestic companies (listed public companies, their majority owned subsidiaries, or regulated entities). Consider implementing the simplified procedure described in rule 4.3.8, which allows verification by confirming the company's status through stock exchange searches, public documents, ASIC database searches, or regulator records, as specified in rules 4.3.8(1), 4.3.8(2), and 4.3.8(3).

controls.label: Does your AML/CTF program include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether and in what manner to verify foreign company existence by confirming the company is a foreign listed public company?
controls.detail-label: Describe your approach to foreign listed public company verification
controls.remediation: Your AML/CTF program does not include the optional risk-based approach for verifying foreign companies by confirming they are foreign listed public companies. Consider implementing risk-based systems and controls to determine whether and how to use foreign listed status as a verification method, as permitted under rule 4.3.9(1).

controls.label: If using foreign listed public company verification, does your procedure require consideration of ML/TF risk including the location of the foreign stock or equivalent exchange?
controls.detail-label: Describe how you assess ML/TF risk related to foreign stock exchange location
controls.remediation: Your foreign listed public company verification procedure does not require assessment of ML/TF risk including the location of the foreign stock exchange. Update your procedure to mandate consideration of ML/TF risk relevant to the designated service, specifically including the jurisdiction of the foreign stock or equivalent exchange, when determining whether and how to verify foreign listed companies, as required under rule 4.3.9(2).

controls.label: Does your procedure require that verification of company information be based as far as possible on reliable and independent documentation, reliable and independent electronic data, or a combination of both?
controls.detail-label: Describe the documentation and/or electronic data sources used for verification
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not require that company information be verified using reliable and independent sources. Update your procedure to mandate verification based as far as possible on reliable and independent documentation, reliable and independent electronic data, or a combination of both, as required under rules 4.3.10(1), 4.3.10(2), and 4.3.10(3).

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether to rely on a disclosure certificate to verify information about a foreign company where such information is not otherwise reasonably available?
controls.detail-label: Describe how you assess whether to accept disclosure certificates for foreign companies
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether to rely on disclosure certificates for foreign companies when information is not otherwise reasonably available. Implement a risk-based process to assess whether disclosure certificates may be used as reliable and independent documentation under the circumstances, as required under rules 4.3.11 and 4.3.12.

controls.label: When determining whether to rely on a disclosure certificate for foreign company verification, does your procedure require consideration of ML/TF risk including the jurisdiction of incorporation, jurisdiction of primary operations, and location of the foreign stock exchange (if any)?
controls.detail-label: Describe how you assess ML/TF risk when considering disclosure certificates
controls.remediation: Your procedure for accepting disclosure certificates does not require assessment of ML/TF risk factors specific to foreign companies. Update your procedure to mandate consideration of ML/TF risk relevant to the designated service, specifically including the jurisdiction of incorporation, jurisdiction of primary operations, and location of the foreign stock or equivalent exchange (if any), when deciding whether to rely on disclosure certificates, as required under rule 4.3.13.

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to respond to any discrepancy that arises when verifying company information, so you can determine whether you are reasonably satisfied about company existence?
controls.detail-label: Describe your process for responding to verification discrepancies
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not include risk-based systems and controls to respond to verification discrepancies for company customers. Implement a process to address any discrepancy that arises during verification so that you can determine whether you remain reasonably satisfied about company existence, as required under rule 4.3.14.

groups.title: Process Confirmation
groups.description: Before answering the detailed compliance questions, confirm whether your organisation operates this business process.

groups.title: General CDD Obligation
groups.description: High-level obligation to be reasonably satisfied that company customers exist and beneficial ownership requirements are met.

groups.title: Collection of Minimum KYC Information
groups.description: Mandatory minimum information to collect for each company type before commencing a designated service.

groups.title: Additional KYC Collection Assessment
groups.description: Risk-based determination of whether to collect KYC information beyond the minimum requirements.

groups.title: Verification of Company Information
groups.description: Procedures to verify minimum and additional KYC information using reliable and independent sources.

groups.title: Additional Verification Assessment
groups.description: Risk-based determination of whether to verify collected KYC information beyond the minimum requirements.

groups.title: Simplified Verification — Domestic Listed & Regulated Companies
groups.description: Optional simplified verification procedure for domestic listed public companies, their majority owned subsidiaries, and companies subject to Commonwealth, State or Territory regulatory oversight.

groups.title: Foreign Listed Public Company Verification
groups.description: Optional risk-based approach to verify foreign companies by confirming listed public company status.

groups.title: Disclosure Certificates for Foreign Companies
groups.description: Risk-based use of disclosure certificates to verify foreign company information when not otherwise reasonably available.

groups.title: Responding to Verification Discrepancies
groups.description: Process for addressing discrepancies discovered during company information verification.
